caption: A woman with black hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She is wearing a light green tunic adorned with a detailed floral embroidered pattern around the neckline, paired with a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the front of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small gold and red logo is visible with the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as she delivers a presentation. While she remains stationary in the first two frames, she begins to gesture with both hands in the latter half of the clip, raising them slightly and moving them to emphasize her points. The lighting is consistent, focusing on her upper body and face against the neutral backdrop.
